original_prompt: 给这个锅做一张淘宝主图
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern E-commerce Kitchenware Scene, High-End Commercial Photography Style. A [modern non-stick wok pan characterized by a distinct faceted exterior design with vertical fluted texturing and a deep bowl shape] sits centrally on a dark sleek marble countertop. The [T-shaped sculptural handle on the transparent glass lid] captures the light. 
[Props]: Fresh vibrant ingredients like red peppers and green basil leaves scattered artistically nearby to add color contrast.
[Background]: A blurred, high-end dark grey modern kitchen interior, creating a premium atmosphere.
Lighting is [Cinematic Studio Lighting], utilizing rim lighting to accentuate the matte faceted polygon sides of the pan and the glossy glass lid."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Left Text, Bottom-Right Product Balance.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “钻石切面 聚能不粘”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Metallic Silver Bold Font, matching the pan's accents].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “重新定义现代厨房美学”. Style: [Clean Sans-serif, White with subtle shadow].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “轻油少烟 | 受热均匀”. Style: [Frosted Glass Pill Shape with Golden Border].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “匠心设计”. Style: [Minimalist Gold Line Icon]."
layout_logic: Since the pan handle extends to the right (based on the provided description/typical angle), the visual weight pulls to the right. Therefore, place the **Main Title and Key Copy in the Top-Left** to create a balanced diagonal composition. The background should be darker (Dark Grey/Black) to let the 'Matte Black' texture of the pan stand out through specular highlights, while the text should be White/Silver/Gold for maximum contrast.
